title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED THIRTEEN, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS."

chunks.text:
H. No. 6268 / 53 OG No. 17, 5512 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1754, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED THIRTEEN, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House, of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item sixteen, Appendix B, School Buildings, page seventy-B, for the Province of Negros Oriental, second congressional district, of Republic Act Numbered One thousand six hundred thirteen is hereby amended to read as follows:

"16. SiquijorГўВЂВ”Cang-alwangГўВЂВ”Aid to PTA for reconstruction and construction ..............

P5,000.00

ГўВЂВњ16 (a) SiquijorГўВЂВ”PoblacionГўВЂВ”Repairs and fencing of the Siquijor Central Primary School ............

2,000.00

ГўВЂВњ16 (b) SiquijorГўВЂВ”CantabonГўВЂВ”Aid to PTA school building ..................

1,000.00

ГўВЂВњ16 (c) SiquijorГўВЂВ”FanlautanГўВЂВ”Aid to PTA school building ...................

1,000.00

"16 (d) SiquijorГўВЂВ”PulangyutaГўВЂВ”For fencing and ground improvement, Siquijor Elementary School

1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
